title: Lost Knowledge
description: Ancient texts speak of a powerful artifact hidden in the ruins of Willow Dale - the Amulet of Arcane Sight. The Arcane Circle has searched for this artifact for decades. As an Apprentice nearing promotion, you've been chosen to attempt its recovery. Navigate the magical traps, face the arcane guardians, and claim this lost treasure for the guild.

objectives.notes: Use Detect Magic to reveal trap triggers

objectives.description: Retrieve the Amulet of Arcane Sight
Return the artifact to Archmage Elara

notes: Final Apprentice quest. Promotion to Journeyman rank. Dungeon exploration with traps and combat. Rewards journeyman robes.
